changes: Searing Flash: Potency has been increased from 600 to 700.
Umbral Impulse: Potency has been increased from 620 to 640.
Umbral Flare: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Sunflare: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration Initiative
new_content.description: An initiative for crafters and gatherers to explore the cosmos, specifically the destination Oizys.

new_content.name: Mission of Gravity
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: Memory's Orbit
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: A Manager's Prudence
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: Terror along the Tracks
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: A Manager's Power
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: An Interstellar Field Trip
new_content.description: Cosmic exploration quest for Disciple of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: Timeworn Techniques
new_content.description: Phantom weapon enhancement quest for Disciple of War or Magic.

new_content.name: In Pursuit of Perfection
new_content.description: Phantom weapon enhancement quest for Disciple of War or Magic.

new_content.name: A Phantom Reborn
new_content.description: Phantom weapon enhancement quest for Disciple of War or Magic.

new_content.name: Oizys
new_content.description: A new destination for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

new_content.name: Phantom Weapon Enhancement System
new_content.description: A system for enhancing phantom weapons, requiring players to proceed using the same class/job used to accept the quest.

new_content.name: Starward Standings
new_content.description: A ranking system for Oizys based on contributions to missions, mech ops, and projects.

new_content.name: Artifact Search
new_content.description: A new mission type using reconnaissance drones to locate artifacts on Oizys.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Inner Wall
housing.description: An interior wall used in habitation modules constructed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Flooring
housing.description: Floorboards used in habitation modules constructed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

housing.name: Cosmic Safety Lamp
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this lamp remains functional in even the most unstable of environs.

housing.name: Cosmic Antenna
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this antenna emits a strong and stable signal without interruption.

housing.name: Shady Cosmoshelter
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing - Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this roofed structure protects against falling objects as well as harmful rays of light.

housing.name: Cosmic Storage Bench
housing.description: Furnishing - This futuristic bench features a concealed storage space for stowing all manner of cosmic clutter.

housing.name: Imitation Cosmoportal
housing.description: Wall-mounted - An imitation window to the imitation stars.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Floor Panel
housing.description: Rug - Pave the way to the future─or the floor of your own personal habitation module─with these sleek panels.
